positive: A whimsical forest landscape, minimalist and stylized. A central, glowing magical portal spirals upward, surrounded by stylized bioluminescent flora and gently flowing mist. The color palette is dominated by deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and soft lavender, accented by bright, neon yellow highlights. The composition is circular and symmetrical, ideal for a repeating pattern or central chest print. Use clean silhouettes, thick outlines, and high contrast in a vector art style, reminiscent of Art Nouveau etching combined with modern graphic design. The scene should evoke a sense of calm wonder and mystery. High detail, suitable for screen printing or textile printing.
negative: blur, blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, copyright, noisy, grain, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, bad composition, jpeg artifacts, out of frame
